segments.original_text: 宇宙ジョーカー横強でいなされて
アルセーヌが帰ってしまうが

segments.text: Up air, up air, up air, up air!

segments.original_text: 落として落として落として落として

segments.text: How many times is he gonna drop him?!
It never ends, never ends, STILL never ends!
segments.original_text: 終わらない終わらないまだ終わらない

segments.text: All the way to KO percent!
segments.original_text: 撃墜するパーセントになるまで

segments.text: Won't stop the up air juggle!
segments.original_text: 空上落としをやめない

segments.text: How many times does this connect?!
segments.original_text: 何回繋がるんだこれは

segments.text: How many times is this happening?!
segments.original_text: 何回行われるんだこれは
何パーセント積み重なっているんだこれは

segments.text: Come on, still going, still going!
segments.original_text: さあまだ続くぞまだ続くぞ
さあ宇宙ジョーカー現在108%
撃墜できるパーセントまで

full_text: Forward tilt gets dodged! Arsene wears off, but— Up air, up air, up air, up air! Dropping, dropping, dropping, dropping! How many times is he gonna drop him?! It never ends, never ends, STILL never ends! All the way to KO percent! Won't stop the up air juggle! Still won't stop! How many times does this connect?! How many times is this happening?! How much percent is stacking?! Come on, still going, still going! Space Joker's at 108%! Until the KO percent! COMPLETE!

corrections.original: 空へ落としをやめない
corrections.corrected: 空上落としをやめない
